title: Forest Spittle
content:
The preciseness of that little moment,
    bowler eyes in hot, top rays
    effervescent through
    spongy forest gloom,
    the wet of the happy
    unreconciled with the dry outside.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Cameron Brown, titled "Forest Spittle", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
